Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Soulforge]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 7''' — The Soulforge is a place where Monarch weapons are made.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 13''' — The Soulforge is the ultimate Soulsmithing tool.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 13''' — The Soulforge is a portable location that can increase the level of existence of projects worked there.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 13''' — The Soulforge was designed and created by Reigan Shen.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 13''' — The Soulforge contains an altar-like anvil with a blue flame inside.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 13''' — The Soulforge uses objects with embedded authority or willpower to fuel its effects.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 13''' — The Soulforge is a portable location that is universally compatible and mobile.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 17''' — The Soulforge is associated with Ozmanthus' Soulsmith inheritance.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 19''' — Lindon used a portal to the Soulforge.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 19''' — The Soulforge is a starry world.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 19''' — The Soulforge contains blue soulfire.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 4''' — The Soulforge has a platform made of large stone wedges.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 4''' — The wedges of the Soulforge platform are marked with symbols that form a script-circle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 4''' — The Soulforge contains blue soulfire at its heart used to bind constructs.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 2''' — The Soulforge contains a gateway to another space.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 2''' — The Soulforge has an anvil at its heart.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 2''' — The Soulforge is a portal.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 4''' — Lindon enters the Soulforge to begin his work.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 5''' — The Soulforge is a place of separation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 21''' — The Soulforge is a place Lindon can enter.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 21''' — The Soulforge is an isolated world.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 21''' — Lindon returned to the Soulforge.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 34''' — The Soulforge is a place where Lindon makes weapons.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
